# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

format_version: "2.1"

services:
  - name: microservice1
    url: http://localhost:8001
  - name: microservice2
    url: http://localhost:8002

routes:
  - name: route1
    methods: ["GET"]
    paths: ["/service1"]
    service: microservice1
  - name: route2
    methods: ["POST"]
    paths: ["/service2"]
    service: microservice2

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    service: microservice1
    config:
      second: 10
  - name: jwt
    service: microservice2
    config:
      uri_param_names: ["access_token"]
      claims_to_verify: ["exp", "nbf"]
